pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_opentoonz.sh which downloads from the official OpenToonz sample repo and places the file at this exact path.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which prepares this directory and export_result.sh which searches it.
Confirmed via task description and verifier.py checks. The original native resolution of dwanko_run.tnz is 1920x1080, meaning the agent must actively change it.
Confirmed via task description and verifier.py checks.
Confirmed via task description instructing export of ONLY frame 8. The source dwanko_run.tnz animation contains 72 frames.
Confirmed via task description and export_result.sh/verifier.py which uses Python PIL to ensure the saved PNG is RGBA and contains a minimum alpha value < 255.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official OpenToonz sample animation 'dwanko_run.tnz', a real-world hand-drawn animation containing 72 frames with a native resolution of 1920x1080. The agent must change the resolution to exactly 1280x720, render frame 8 specifically, and export it as an RGBA PNG with a transparent background (alpha channel < 255), saving the result in the target output directory.
